title: A currency range for deals in Numbers Column?
excerpt: Hi - I’m wondering if there is a feature to include a numerical range in the numbers column, specifically for estimates. For example, we would like to include a “deal value” column as seen on typical CRM platforms. But b…

posts.author: crissyflynn (Crissy Flynn)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I’m wondering if there is a feature to include a numerical range in the numbers column, specifically for estimates. For example, we would like to include a “deal value” column as seen on typical CRM platforms. But because our deals can be so holistic and specific to the customer as we sign contracts, there could easily be a range. Is there a way to display such a range, such as $30,000 - $80,000? Or would we need to create two separate columns to show a potential starting and ending number? Thank you!
